[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a colorful video game farming interface overlaying a 3D outdoor farm scene with a large “Gulld’s” sign across the top right.

Main Subject:
A game UI panel in the center shows a grid of fruit weight values with orange star icons, additional rows of smaller icons and numbers, and a dark top bar reading “7m 13s,” while behind it the farm area includes green fields, raised crop beds, and a character near the left side of the central yard.

Setting:
The scene is outdoors on a grassy, blocky 3D landscape under clear daytime lighting, with multiple garden beds and paths made of textured ground blocks. A dark brown wooden structure and farming equipment are visible behind the UI, and a large orange machine or device sits on the right edge.

Visual Details:
The UI includes green buttons labeled “Seeds,” a green button with text, a golden “Sell” button, and a darker “Garden” area at the top center, with small icons in the top bar on the far left. The main panel displays multiple fruit items with values such as “95.95kg,” “60.23kg,” “66.60kg,” “61.73kg,” “70.66kg,” “68.76kg,” and “71.17kg” (some lines are partially unclear due to resolution), each accompanied by orange star ratings and some purple/star icons in rows below. At the bottom left of the UI area, there is a gold coin-like icon followed by “31.94M¢” and a small plus symbol. The camera angle appears slightly elevated, looking down toward the farm beds.

Visible Text:
7m 13s
Seeds
Garden
Sell
Search
Got anything to sell?
Seeds
Crops
Geares
Pets
ALL
31.94M¢
Gulld’s

Practical Summary:
This image is a screenshot of a farming game with an on-screen menu for seeds and selling, shown over a blocky outdoor farm yard. It displays countdown time at the top and multiple item weight and star-rating values in a central grid.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
